title: lotus crassifolius var. subglaber
intro: Lotus crassifolius var. subglaber, also known as the Lotus or Kamal, is a variant of the Lotus crassifolius species, which is a type of aquatic plant. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits associated with Lotus crassifolius var. subglaber include reducing fever, alleviating coughs and sore throats, and treating various digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Lotus crassifolius var. subglaber is often dried and used as an ingredient in teas, soups, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
